name: Dialog

values.name: body
values.comment: Option to set body content of dialog
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Dialog.Config msg -> Dialog.Config msg

values.name: config
values.comment: Create an initial dialog config. You can specify the title, body, footer and other option functions.

values.name: danger
values.comment: Option to apply is-danger color to dialog

values.name: dark
values.comment: Option to apply is-dark color to dialog

values.name: footer
values.comment: Option to set footer content of dialog
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Dialog.Config msg -> Dialog.Config msg

values.name: info
values.comment: Option to apply is-info color to dialog

values.name: large
values.comment: Option to apply is-large to dialog

values.name: link
values.comment: Option to apply is-link color to dialog

values.name: medium
values.comment: Option to apply is-medium to dialog

values.name: primary
values.comment: Option to apply is-primary color to dialog

values.name: small
values.comment: Option to apply is-small to dialog

values.name: success
values.comment: Option to apply is-success color to dialog

values.name: title
values.comment: Option to set title string of dialog

values.name: viewCustomLoading
values.comment: View loading dialog with custom element.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: viewLoading
values.comment: View loading dialog. Styled using [bulma progress bar](https://bulma.io/documentation/elements/progress/#docsNav)

values.name: warning
values.comment: Option to apply is-warning color to dialog
